project.name: Business OS
project.description: A modular business management platform integrating ERP modular services, TikTok UGC (User Generated Content) studio, Etsy wizard automation, and bridge-server integration. The system manages products, inventory, orders, payments, shipping, social media content, and Etsy marketplace operations through a plugin-based architecture.

layers.name: Core Platform
layers.description: ERP Modular - API Gateway, Auth, CRUD, Rate Limiting, Micro-frontend Shell, Database models

layers.name: TikTok UGC Studio
layers.description: Social media content generation pipeline - video/audio/image generation, scripting, browser automation, post scheduling

layers.name: Etsy Wizard
layers.description: Etsy marketplace automation - listing management, image generation, product detection, rule validation

layers.name: Bridge Server
layers.description: Integration hub connecting Plane (task management), Planka (kanban), BookStack (docs), and OpenObserve (logging)

layers.name: Modules
layers.description: Independent microservices: auth, ERP bridge, media management, product analysis/scraping, profile management, shared library

layers.name: Inner Monologue
layers.description: AI agent with self-reflection, delegation, heartbeat monitoring, HITL (human-in-the-loop), resilience patterns

layers.name: Prompt Studio
layers.description: Prompt management and loader service for AI agent prompts

layers.name: Infrastructure & Deployment
layers.description: Docker compose files, Dockerfiles, CI/CD workflows (GitHub Actions), PM2 ecosystem configs, nginx configs, deployment scripts

layers.name: Root Configuration & Documentation
layers.description: Project-level configuration files, documentation, and shared setup scripts

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the Business OS architecture — a modular platform integrating ERP Modular, TikTok UGC Studio, Etsy Wizard, Inner Monologue AI agent, and bridge integrations.

tour.title: System Architecture
tour.description: ARCHITECTURE.md describes the service layering, Bridge Server integration, and how Plane, Planka, BookStack, and OpenObserve connect.

tour.title: Project Status & Roadmap
tour.description: STATUS.md tracks current development state, active modules, and future roadmap for all Business OS components.

tour.title: Core Platform — ERP Modular Entry Point
tour.description: The ERP Modular service is the central API gateway (port 8102). FastAPI app with CRUD entity management, template rendering, auth, rate limiting, and subscription plans.

tour.title: ERP Modular — API Gateway & Auth
tour.description: API Gateway with reverse proxy routing, JWT + RBAC authentication, token-bucket rate limiting, and a FastAPI CRUD router for modules, templates, and entities.

tour.title: ERP Modular — Core Engine & Plugins
tour.description: Database session management, plugin system with abstract base classes, and Jinja2 template engine for rendering.

tour.title: TikTok UGC Studio — Content Generation Pipeline
tour.description: Main service for automated social media content. Micro service entry, FFmpeg composer for video assembly, fal.ai client for AI image-to-video, and AI video generation pipeline.

tour.title: TikTok UGC Studio — Script Generation & TTS
tour.description: AI script generator creates compelling TikTok video scripts. gTTS text-to-speech wrapper generates voiceovers. Pipeline variants for affiliate, cartoon, and default content.

tour.title: TikTok UGC Studio — Browser Automation & Posting
tour.description: Playwright-based browser uploader for TikTok, remote auth service for user login flow, VNC auth server for headless environments, and Post For Me integration for social media auto-posting.

tour.title: TikTok UGC Studio — Monitoring & Scout
tour.description: Monitor loop tracks performance and optimizes content strategy. Scout (R&D) provides trend intelligence, viral video analysis, competitor tracking, and content template generation.

tour.title: Etsy Wizard — Listing Automation
tour.description: AI-powered Etsy listing assistant with micro service entry, product detection, image generation, and rules validation for marketplace compliance.

tour.title: Etsy Wizard — Rules & Configuration
tour.description: Etsy marketplace rules for image format, listing content, and policy compliance. Assistant module provides AI-driven listing generation with fix and optimization.

tour.title: Inner Monologue — AI Agent Framework
tour.description: Self-reflective AI agent with sub-agent delegation system, heartbeat monitoring, human-in-the-loop confirmation, persistent memory, and resilience patterns.

tour.title: Inner Monologue — Delegation & Resilience
tour.description: Multi-Agent Delegation System manages sub-agents. Resilience engine provides retry strategies with fallback providers. HITL provides confirmation mode and flag-as-needed workflow.

tour.title: Inner Monologue — Memory, Heartbeat & Scanner
tour.description: Persistent memory with condenser for long-term recall. Heartbeat monitor shows agent status. System Bot Scanner auto-discovers ERP Stack services.

tour.title: Prompt Studio — Prompt Management
tour.description: Centralized prompt management service (port 8107). Loads, versions, and serves AI prompts with loader abstraction layer. Stores UGC prompts for product holding, usage, and review.

tour.title: Bridge Server — Integration Hub
tour.description: Bridge Server connects Plane, Planka, BookStack, and OpenObserve into a unified platform. App entry with settings config and handler modules.

tour.title: Modules — Auth & Media
tour.description: Auth Module handles user registration, login, and OAuth (Google/GitHub). Media Module provides file upload and management service.

tour.title: Modules — Product Analysis Pipeline
tour.description: Product scraper with Playwright + Gemini Vision, analysis pipeline (normalizer → enricher → analyzer), database models for tracking sessions across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Amazon, and more.

tour.title: Infrastructure — Docker Orchestration
tour.description: Docker Compose files orchestrate all services: main stack, Plane, Planka, BookStack, OpenObserve, Siyuan, and network configuration. Multi-Dockerfile for each service.

tour.title: Infrastructure — Deployment & CI/CD
tour.description: GitHub Actions workflows deploy all services. PM2 ecosystem configs manage processes. Aider configuration for AI-assisted development.
